positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of forest animals—a curious fox, a playful raccoon, and a wise owl—gathered around a glowing, stylized constellation map. The scene has a vibrant, nocturnal feel, dominated by deep indigo blues, cosmic purples, and pops of glowing gold and emerald green. The composition is centered and symmetrical, ideal for a T-shirt print, with crisp, strong outlines (clean silhouettes). The style should be modern fantasy illustration, highly detailed but designed for flat application, using negative space effectively. The animals are posed in a joyful, adventurous manner, hinting at exploration and friendship. Cinematic, high contrast, volumetric lighting.
